MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Bruce C. Burge, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Mentone Hotel, LLC and Defendant, Mavis Austin appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
